case_title: FELIKS KUBIN VS. LUCIA POSECION SUCHIKUL

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENTS DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED. FILED BY DEFENDANT SUCHIKUL, LUCIA POSECION

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUBIN, FELIKS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE # 0.00 - SERVED OCT-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUCHIKUL, LUCIA POSECION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUBIN, FELIKS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUCHIKUL, LUCIA POSECION $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,300.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KUBIN, FELIKS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FILED BY DEFENDANT SUCHIKUL, LUCIA POSECION
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY KUBIN, FELIKS AS TO DEFENDANT SUCHIKUL, LUCIA POSECION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF FELIKS KUBIN & DEFENDANT LUCIA POSECION SUCHIKUL. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
